description: Letter from Abū Is[ḥāq?] to his 'father' Abū l-Ḥasan ʿEli b. Hillel. Written in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100-1138 CE), the addressee's brother-in-law. Discusses various business and family matters, including a potential marriage and the writer's anger at the addressee. Someone has ophthalmia (r16) and a certain girl "went mad" when she heard something (r23)—perhaps the prospect of marrying Faḍāʾil. The addressee is asked to send wheat urgently (v3, v7). ASE
tags: personal, Illness, illness: eye, illness letter 969-1517
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
